sections.title: Should — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Should is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + should + base verb (advice, suggestion, obligation). Rules: 'Should' is used to give advice or suggest what is right to do | Same form for all subjects | Negative: should not / shouldn't | Question: Should + subject + base verb...?
sections.formula: Subject + should + base verb (advice, suggestion, obligation)

sections.title: Should — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Here are everyday sentences using Should that you will use in daily conversation, at home, and with friends.
sections.formula: Subject + should + base verb (advice, suggestion, obligation)

examples.hindi: तुम्हें अपनी सेहत का ध्यान रखना चाहिए।
examples.english: You should take care of your health.

examples.hindi: हमें दूसरों की मदद करनी चाहिए।

sections.title: Should — Office & Professional Usage
sections.explanation: Practice Should in professional and office contexts so you can use it confidently at work.
sections.formula: Subject + should + base verb (advice, suggestion, obligation)

examples.hindi: तुम्हें अपने माता-पिता की सुनना चाहिए।
examples.english: You should listen to your parents.

examples.hindi: हमें environment का ध्यान रखना चाहिए।
examples.english: We should take care of the environment.

examples.hindi: उसे यह मौका नहीं छोड़ना चाहिए।
examples.english: She should not miss this opportunity.

sections.title: Should — Negative and Question Forms
sections.explanation: Learn how to make negative sentences and questions using Should. Common mistakes: forgetting to keep the base verb form, or wrong subject agreement.
sections.formula: Subject + should + base verb (advice, suggestion, obligation)

examples.hindi: तुम्हें ज्यादा गुस्सा नहीं करना चाहिए।
examples.english: You should not get angry too much.

examples.hindi: उसे अपनी गलती स्वीकार करनी चाहिए।
हमें एक दूसरे का सम्मान करना चाहिए।
